business_ideas.idea: Vertical Agent-as-a-Service: pre-built AI agents bundled per industry (dental, auto repair, etc.)
Doge-as-a-Service: AI tracking idle employees, sold to consultants like McKinsey
Curated in-person events connecting entrepreneurs and investors for serendipity
Holy Health: bundle insurance access for chiropractors and physical therapists
Cargo ship hull coating to improve fuel efficiency a few knots faster
Divorce financing: advance on alimony during proceedings

predictions.text: Vertical Agent-as-a-Service will be acquired as roll-ups by consolidators like Constellation
